title: MC STADT 2
description: A small but nice modpack based on the Create Mod.
body:
MC CITY 2 is a technical modpack with Create and many other mods.
Now MC STADT is going into the second round (second season), there will be a new season of MC STADT every year.
For example, with these mods you can build automated farms and elevators. There is also a mod that allows you to transport boxes from one location to another.
We also have new equipment for the Create Mod. There are many things you can do in the modpack. Among other things, we added the Sophisticated Backpacks mod for backpacks. There are many ways to generate electricity (kinetic energy).
One of these would be building a wind turbine or building a water wheel.
As you may have already noticed, there are many options. There are also many tutorials on YouTube explaining the Create Mod and other mods from this modpack. It's best to just try it out yourself.

Mod list:
Modern Fullbright (by awesome_hippo)
Create Crafts & Additions (by MRHminer)
Farmer's Delight (by vectorwing)
Bookshelf (by DarkhaxDev)
Macaw's Furniture (by sketch_macaw)
Macaw's Lights and Lamps (by sketch_macaw)
Macaw's Windows (by sketch_macaw)
Carry On (by Tschipp)
GraveStone Mod (by henkelmax)
Macaw's Bridges (by sketch_macaw)
Just Enough Items (JEI) (by mezz)
Simple Voice Chat (by henkelmax)
Create (by simibubi)
Create Deco (by talrey)
Macaw's Trapdoors (by sketch_macaw)
Macaw's Fences and Walls (by sketch_macaw)
JourneyMap (by techbrew)
Sophisticated Backpacks (by P3pp3rF1y)
Sophisticated Core (by P3pp3rF1y)
Macaw's Doors (by sketch_macaw)
Macaw's Paintings (by sketch_macaw)
